description: Defect Scout — multi-environment defect reproduction configuration. Add one entry per Kinetic server version to test. Set enabled=true to include an environment in fleet runs.

environments.name: Kinetic 2026.1 Dev
environments.notes: Local 2026.1 development instance. apiKey is used for REST API authentication; leave empty to fall back to Basic (username+password).

environments.name: Kinetic 2025.2 QA
environments.restApiBaseUrl: 2025.2 QA REST API base URL goes here
environments.notes: Set enabled=true and fill in credentials. apiKey is the Kinetic REST API key; leave empty to use Basic auth.

environments.name: Kinetic 2025.1 Staging
environments.notes: Set enabled=true and fill in credentials. apiKey is the Kinetic REST API key; leave empty to use Basic auth.

playwright.comment: timeout in ms per playwright-cli action. screenshotOnStep=true takes a screenshot after every step. ignoreHttpsErrors=true bypasses self-signed / untrusted certificate warnings (NET::ERR_CERT_AUTHORITY_INVALID) — required for most Azure-hosted Kinetic dev/QA servers. UI steps use playwright-cli directly; API steps use Invoke-RestMethod with apiKey (or Basic auth fallback).
